content:
- Completed task 06 end-to-end: verified plan, switched marker to NOW EXECUTE, implemented real process worker job execution/runtime state machine, and added deterministic command-runner test seam.
- Expanded process contracts (`jobs.rs`, `state.rs`, `worker.rs`) with typed job specs, single active runtime slot, job request/rejection handling, timeout/cancel paths, and real-command builders for bootstrap/rewind/promote/demote/start/stop/restart/fencing.
- Added and passed focused/unit+real execution tests for all required job kinds; updated HA decide fixture + worker contract tests for new ActiveJob/ProcessWorkerCtx shapes; all required gates passed (`make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`).
- Updated task file checkboxes/status (`<passing>true</passing>`), ran task switch script, and appended an AGENTS learning about keeping NamespaceGuard alive during pg_ctl lifecycle tests.
- Next likely step is task 08 (HA worker dispatch wiring) now that process ingress contract exists and task 06 is marked done/passing.

- Updated task 05b per user follow-up: tests are now explicitly the primary focus.
- Added hard requirement: if tests appear missing and are not already represented in planned tasks, create new test-creation tasks.
- Expanded required coverage dimensions in task text: unit tests, integration tests using real binaries, and broader/many differing BDD e2e scenarios.
- Updated acceptance criteria and execution plan sectioning to include explicit test sufficiency + planning-gap audit before lint verification.

- Ran startup memory load via .ralph/progress_read.sh for agent Choose-Task (no prior content printed).
- Parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md and found many tasks with <passes>false</passes>; also found unfinished ultra_high tasks in story-rust-system-harness.
- Applied priority + STORY CHAIN RULE: selected first unblocked unfinished ultra_high in that story chain: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05b-task-deep-review-codebase-and-verify-done-work.md.
- Wrote only that path to .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Next cycle should execute task 05b directly before touching other stories/tasks.

- Read prior progress memory and active task path from .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Ran a broad parallel exploration pass (10 concurrent probes) to ground a real plan before execution.
- Found .ralph/model.txt is currently normal_high, done tasks include 01/02/03/04/05/05a/06/07/10, and make targets check/test/test-bdd/lint exist.
- Found deny policy for clippy panic/unwrap/expect at crate root plus scoped test-harness allow; also found many panic/expect occurrences in src/tests that must be runtime-vs-test classified during deep review.
- Replaced the execution plan in task 05b with a detailed phase-by-phase runbook and added TO BE VERIFIED at the end as required.
- Next step in next run: since TO BE VERIFIED is now present, perform deep skeptical plan verification, change at least one plan item, then replace marker with NOW EXECUTE.

- Read startup memory and current task file `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05b-task-deep-review-codebase-and-verify-done-work.md`.
- Detected `TO BE VERIFIED`, then performed a deep skeptical verification sweep using a broad parallel probe set (16 concurrent checks) across task status, lint policy, done-task inventory, real-binary coverage references, and Makefile gates.
- Altered the execution plan (required by workflow) with concrete improvements: deterministic evidence log paths for make outputs, strict sequential gate execution to avoid Cargo lock/link flakiness, explicit done-task header/tag consistency checks, and a post-canary clean-tree verification step.
- Replaced plan marker `TO BE VERIFIED` with `NOW EXECUTE`.
- Began execution per plan: Phase A preflight confirmed `.ralph/model.txt` was `normal_high`, set it to exact `deep_review`, checked off executed Phase A/acceptance items, and stopped immediately per the preflight handoff rule.
- Next step on the next run: continue task 05b in full execution mode from Phase B onward (no more exploration), complete deep review + follow-up task creation + required make gates, then only at final closeout restore `.ralph/model.txt` to `normal_high`.

- Task 05b execution: ran `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint` sequentially and saved logs under `.ralph/evidence/05b/` (including final reruns).
- Deep review findings:
  - Real PG16/etcd3 tests are present but default to early-return when binaries are missing; this environment does not have `/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin/*` or `/usr/bin/etcd`, so real-binary paths are not exercised by default.
  - Found a correctness bug in real-binary tests: `PortReservation` was being held through spawn/start, which would prevent postgres/pg_ctl from binding ports when binaries are actually installed. Fixed by dropping reservations immediately before spawn/start and by allocating ports closer to use.
  - Proved runtime lint enforcement via canary unwrap injection + clippy failure, then reverted (log captured).
- Added follow-up tasks in story order:
  - `10a` to add an explicit enforcement mode (`make test-real` / env var) so CI/dev can require real binaries.
  - `10b` to implement a real etcd3-backed `DcsStore` adapter + integration tests using the existing harness.
- Added `.ralph/evidence/05b/review_summary.md` to summarize findings and recommendations.
- Updated `AGENTS.md` with learnings about port reservations and rare cargo archive/object-file flake mitigated by `cargo clean`.
- Next: run `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, restore `.ralph/model.txt` to `normal_high`, stage + commit all changes for task 05b.
